metadata.title: Swing Low, Sweet Chariot
metadata.subtitle: African American spiritual, c. 1862
metadata.composer: Traditional African American spiritual, often attributed to Wallace Willis (c. 1862)
metadata.lyricist: Wallace Willis (c. 1820–c. 1880), Choctaw freedman in Indian Territory
metadata.x_pd_basis: 19th-century African American spiritual, traditional and anonymous-derivative. First published in *Jubilee Songs* by the Fisk Jubilee Singers (1872). PD by > 150 years
